comment: Sync-bus heartbeat. Each node updates its entry on every push. See .sync/BUS.md.

claude-local.focus: Technical verification (1.7.11): live audio loads from Supabase (CORS *, 200) + valid AAC stream (ffprobe: aac 48k stereo ~253k, 339.75s); Pages renders release from Supabase; launch-quantized phase-preserving seek math reviewed = correct (next-boundary calc, whole-unit delta, latency-anchored startedAt, equal-power fade). FINDINGS: (1) buy/donate URLs null; (2) full 5:40 track decoded fully into RAM (~130MB) — heavy on mobile, consider a preview; (3) cover art text reads 'Blue Friday / Sontra Crew' but release meta is 'Where is James (DOTT remix) / Anton Rotof' — confirm intended. Still needs user audio listen-test.
